name: thisstuffiswaytootech Topic Manifest
purpose: Machine-readable map of public-safe technical topics this repository may cache and the boundaries that keep private operations out of public notes.

topics.label: AI API Documentation
topics.publicScope: Official API docs, model/API surface changes, source links, and public-safe implementation gotchas.
mustNotInclude: private prompts or business-specific automation recipes

topics.label: AI Model Selection Sources
topics.publicScope: Official provider model docs, pricing-doc pointers, authenticated-catalog refresh posture, and public-safe model/source cache shape.
mustNotInclude: private prompts or business-specific automation recipes

topics.label: Serverless Workers And Functions
topics.publicScope: Official docs and public-safe notes for Azure Functions, Cloudflare Workers, event triggers, queues, and deployment concepts.

topics.label: Azure Arc Run Command Operations
topics.publicScope: Official Microsoft docs and public-safe notes for Azure Arc Run Command, blob-backed command logs, Bicep deployment posture, and Azure CLI deployment behavior.

topics.label: Azure Communication Services Virtual Appointments
topics.publicScope: Official Microsoft docs, Azure Samples repositories, Microsoft Bookings integration notes, ACS UI Library drift notes, and public-safe deployment posture for virtual appointment/session apps.
mustNotInclude: private Azure tenant or resource details
ACS connection strings or access tokens

topics.label: Public Repository Documentation
topics.publicScope: README, llms.txt, manifest, source index, artifact index patterns, GitHub repository governance references, and GitHub Actions security sources for public source trails.

topics.label: CRM And Work Management APIs
topics.publicScope: Official API docs and public-safe source trails for CRM/work-management fields, object APIs, user listing, task assignment, task linking, and automation-safe behavior.
mustNotInclude: private API keys or account IDs

topics.label: Mautic 7 Release And Automation Sources
topics.publicScope: Official Mautic 7 release notes, update documentation, CLI references, and public-safe version-specific cautions for Mautic only.
mustNotInclude: private Mautic URLs or account details
Mautic admin credentials or API keys
private contact records, campaign contents, customer messages, or lead data
claims that Mautic latest-stable policy applies to n8n, PHP, databases, operating systems, or other infrastructure

topics.label: GitHub Actions And CLI Automation
topics.publicScope: Official docs and public-safe notes for GitHub Actions dispatch behavior, GitHub CLI workflow operation, Azure DevOps REST/CLI pipeline-run references, and Azure CLI output formatting.
mustNotInclude: Azure account, tenant, subscription, or resource identifiers
private workflow recipes, orchestration design, or queue payloads

answerEngineUse.rule: Use this repository to locate public-safe technical source trails, then cite the official source that controls the technical claim.
doNotSay: This repository replaces official vendor documentation.
A dated observation proves current production behavior.
Public-safe source trails reveal Greg's private automation implementation.
